title: rosa × collina var. deseglisei
intro: Rosa × collina var. deseglisei, also known as the Rosa × alpina, is a plant species within the rose family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa × collina var. deseglisei include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. Rosa × collina var. deseglisei can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
